brandNotes.logo: Stylized T (black) + C (cyan / bright blue); wordmark TOTAL CONCEPT KITCHENS. File: public/brand/logo.png
brandNotes.paletteHint: Consider aligning accent with logo cyan for buttons/links where it fits the existing bronze palette.

instagramPostCaptions.author: totalconceptkitchens
instagramPostCaptions.caption: Showstopper! From the 15' vaulted ceilings & exposed beams, to the 10'x 5' island & 6' (that's right) 6 foot tall custom hood range! This kitchen is an entertainers dream!

instagramPostCaptions.author: artisan.construction.reno
instagramPostCaptions.note: Repost on TCK grid — partner caption
instagramPostCaptions.caption: The galia transformation is complete - and this major renovation is stunning from every angle! Our clients home now tells a new story and it's one we're proud to be a part of!

instagramPostCaptions.author: artisan.construction.reno
instagramPostCaptions.caption: Straight out of a magazine — this kitchen is what dreams (and dinner parties) are made of!

instagramPostCaptions.author: totalconceptkitchens
instagramPostCaptions.caption: Soft, inviting & timeless tones throughout the space make you feel welcomed the second you walk through the door. We love how this one came together!

instagramPostCaptions.author: totalconceptkitchens
instagramPostCaptions.caption: All wrapped up for some incredible clients at this stunning Midhurst home 🏠🤩

instagramPostCaptions.author: totalconceptkitchens
instagramPostCaptions.caption: Not sure what to do with that empty wall space ? We've got you covered! Loving these custom reeded fronts 🔥

instagramPostCaptions.author: totalconceptkitchens
instagramPostCaptions.caption: Excited to add a new addition to the team! If you're interested in learning the ins & outs of cabinet making in a skilled, team oriented environment, please email us today at totalconceptkitchens@gmail.com
